engine_note: No OPENAI_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / SERPAPI_API_KEY / PERPLEXITY_API_KEY present. WebSearch used as directional proxy only (1 engine). cited_us=true requires sayfeai.com (or active transition domain) to appear in proxy results.
sample_weighting: Weighted to priority buckets (compliance/assessment/partner) + fresh chatgpt-superapp-aria seed + rotating comparison/local.

results.notes: Target /compliance-assessment still 404 -> PILLAR HANDOFF (P0). ComplySense (techno-pm) new entrant owning the free/<5-min promise. ai-180.solutions appears again (still <3 in-run, watch).

FIRST measured canonical citation in priority buckets. sayfeai.com/blog/ai-compliance-colorado-eu-small-business-2026 surfaced ~position 9. On-page query-match win (blog title literally contains 'SB 26-189 / SB 189'). Breaks the compliance-bucket 0% streak.
Target /compliance/ai-policy-template 404 -> PILLAR HANDOFF (P1). All winners offer a one-click downloadable (PDF+DOCX) template.
Target /partners/msp 404 -> PILLAR HANDOFF (P2). Zero MSP content on-site. 76.4% of MSPs expect AI services to be 11-50% of revenue (channel demand confirmed).
Target /compliance/eu-ai-act 404 -> PILLAR HANDOFF (P0). Article 50 transparency obligations confirmed live Aug 2 2026; SME simplified pathways exist (citation-worthy framing for the pillar).

Page EXISTS (/blog/chatgpt-superapp-aria-redesign-business-2026) and is the one fresh measured loss on an existing page. DIAGNOSIS: page self-canonicalized to sayfeai.chat (non-canonical) in <link rel=canonical>, og:url, og:image, twitter:image, and JSON-LD author/publisher/image. PATCHED this run -> all corrected to sayfeai.com; dateModified bumped 2026-06-10 -> 2026-06-12. Hard news domains dominate; freshness window open through ~late June.
Target /compliance-assessment 404 -> PILLAR HANDOFF (P0). TrustLayer Risk Matrix + RiskHelper.ai + Logicballs own the '5-minute / no-signup' promise.

madewell.ai appears again (direct-competitor flagged by content engine 6/11; still <3 in-run threshold). Pricing in proxy answers shows $25 monthly / $20 annual for Business -- consistent with the unverified April-2 cut a competitor claims; site canon is $25 annual/$30 monthly. PRICING DISCREPANCY -> flag to content engine, do not mass-update under rule 4.
Local directories (goodfirms, designrush, plego) + Microsoft-aligned shops dominate. /about exists but doesn't surface; no measured patchable on-page gap tied to a fresh diagnosis this run.
